decisions.title: Keynote opening Digital Commons EDIC: Moving beyond the Digital Uncommons
decisions.reason_ja: Bert Hubert keynote on EU digital sovereignty. Mentions ChatGPT as perceived free infrastructure, Signal/Mastodon/PeerTube as digital commons, Microsoft 365 replacement strategies. AI-relevant context but policy/governance focused rather than technical. Reference for future digital sovereignty page enrichment.
decisions.body_excerpt:
# Keynote opening Digital Commons EDIC
Last Thursday, 11th of December, saw the launch of the new Digital Commons European Digital Infrastructure Consortium.

decisions.title: Workarounds for C11 _Generic
decisions.reason_ja: C11 _Generic type-generic macro technical deep-dive by Simon Tatham (PuTTY author). Low-level language type system topic, no AI/LLM/agent relevance.
decisions.body_excerpt:
# Workarounds for C11 _Generic
The C programming language has a limited form of type-generic programming, based on selection expressions using the keyword _Generic.
